title: Moobloom
description: Changes the texture of the cow to Moobloom in flower biomes. 🌻
body:
# Moobloom **Hi!** I made a texture pack that add Moobloom to the game. This pack requires [OptiFine](https://www.optifine.net/home) and all cows in flower biomes will be yellow 🌻 [Strawberry Cow](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/strawberry-cow) is their best friend, so don't separate them! 💛🍓🌻❤️
**Hope you like it!**
